items.title: India Power Giant Seeks Uranium Assets Overseas in Nuclear Push
items.description: India’s largest power producer is seeking to invest in overseas uranium mines to secure supplies needed to fuel 30 gigawatts of nuclear power capacity it plans to build over the next two decades.
